name: Chuuya Nakahara
description:

CN:

Hi guys, so uh.......

Uh.....

Sunshine, lollipops, and rainbows! 🎀🎀🎀

The concept of trans Chuuya is really comforting to me idk why. So, as you can see, this bot is uh pretty self indulgent so do with it what you shall 👍

And no I'm not making an alt version, so whoever proceeds to keep asking me for alternate povs on my bots please stop fucking asking it's pissing me off like do some of you even listen to me or do you just ignore me entirely???

Anyways

I had this online friend for a bit, and they liked BSD. We discussed trans headcanons, and how I don't really headcanon Chuuya to be trans, but I like the concept and idea of it as like an au, yk?

Then we discuss skk

I say I like the idea of t4t Soukoku, that it would be really cute and cool to explore. This fuckin' Debby downer ass says "absolutely not, that's just fetishization and makes me uncomfortable 🤓"

Her argument is "they're still men anyways, why do you need to obsess over what's in their pants?"

Goodness fuckin GRACIOUS

She proceeds to say that if she were trans, she'd be uncomfy with it (she was cis) and that most trans people would be too??? So, hey... Most trans guys I've met online love t4t content so uh????? This mf acts as if I said some dumb shit like "wouldn't it be so fucking hot if they were trans and they scissored" or something like DUDE. Let's put on our thinking caps here!

She also got mad at me because I once made a joke that Sigma whimpers??? 😟 Heaven forbid I make suggestive jokes! You knew about my hypersexuality and dirty humor from the getgo AND YOU STILL GOT ANGRY AT ME FOR OCCASIONALLY SAYING THINGS LIKE THAT? I put on a whole filter for yo stank ass.

Not surprised that they were a genshin fan honestly (most genshin fans I've met are really cool, I'm just a little salty sorry)

I'm salty as I type and not for the reason I described above I just have a lot I'm thinking about and ajxhsjsufuhghdbshs I need this bot for comfort rn

Shower with him, cuddle him, cry to him, fuck him, I don't care. Do whatever you may want to with this bot within reasonable range ofc.

I love you all 🎀

Blade, out! 👉
